BIGGOLD DIGITAL INNOVATION CO., LTD. is crucial to the development of technology for organizations, playing a vital role in driving the organization.

Make an impact with NTT DATA
Join a company that is pushing the boundaries of what is possible. We are renowned for our technical excellence and leading innovations, and for making a difference to our clients and society. Our workplace embraces diversity and inclusion – it’s a place where you can grow, belong and thrive.

Your day at NTT DATA
As a Solutions Architect at NTT DATA, you will be a cornerstone in our mission to craft cutting-edge, complex solutions tailored to our clients' needs. Your day will involve consulting with clients and partnering with internal teams to create strategies, transformational designs, and an architectural vision that provides true business value.

You will contribute to developing solution architectures for specific business, infrastructure, or functional areas. Your expertise will allow you to evaluate different architectures considering cost, performance, and scalability, and then produce detailed specifications for both cloud-based and on-premises components.

Your role will include supporting changes through the preparation of technical plans and applying design principles that comply with our architectural standards. You will take responsibility for understanding client requirements, gathering DATA, conducting analysis, and resolving problems.

Stay ahead of the curve by monitoring emerging technologies and sharing your knowledge through reports and technology roadmaps. Use your design skills to create components that handle both functional and non-functional requirements, including proof of concept (POC). You will also review, verify, and continually improve your designs.

Lastly, contribute to developing new go-to-market services and apply your expertise across both technical levels within the enterprise architecture and the value chain to develop holistic and integrated solutions.



To thrive in this role, you need to have:
Comprehensive knowledge in multi-vendor service integrations and cross-functional software, operating systems, and infrastructure designs.
Ability to deploy specific infrastructures and application software in line with relevant methodologies and frameworks.
Skill in developing and leveraging specialized knowledge of reference architectures.
Ability to keep up with trends and developments in technology domains.
Proven experience in integrating solutions for specific projects with business domains, industry standards, established patterns, and best practices.
Good experience in client engagement, consulting, and client needs assessment.
Excellent communication skills, both verbal and written, coupled with strong interpersonal skills to build solid working relationships.
Experience in an agile development environment.
A bachelor's degree or equivalent in computer science, engineering, business, or a related field.

Hybrid Working

บริษัท ดิทโต้ (ประเทศไทย) จำกัด (มหาชน) บริษัทหนึ่งในเครือดิทโต้กรุ๊ปซึ่งก่อตั้งขึ้นเมื่อปี 2542 คือผู้เชี่ยวชาญด้านการวางระบบบริหารจัดการงานเอกสารด้วยเทคโนโลยีและนวัตกรรมทางเลือกที่ทันสมัย ภายใต้แนวคิด “ครบวงจร คุ้มค่า ประหยัด รักษ์สิ่งแวดล้อม”             นอกจากจะนำเสนอระบบถ่ายเอกสารมัลติฟังก์ชั่นสมรรถนะสูงที่รวมการทำงานของเครื่องถ่ายเอกสาร พริ้นเตอร์ แฟกซ์ และสแกนเนอร์ไว้ในเครื่องเดียว ทั้งแบบสีและขาว-ดำ ให้เลือกหลากหลายรุ่นตามความเหมาะสมในการใช้งานแล้ว ดิทโต้ยังมีทีมงานที่ปรึกษาให้บริการวิเคราะห์ปัญหาด้านการจัดการเอกสารเพื่อวางรูปแบบโครงสร้างระบบเครือข่ายบริหารงานเอกสารและเครื่องใช้สำนักงานให้ตรงกับความต้องการของลูกค้าเฉพาะราย รวมถึงเชื่อมต่อเครือข่ายการใช้งานให้ครอบคลุมทุกแผนกเพื่อเพิ่มศักยภาพและความคล่องตัวในการดำเนินงานขององค์กร             ด้วยความยึดมั่นในแนวทางดำเนินธุรกิจแบบ 3Rs (Reduce / Reuse / Recycle) ซึ่งเน้นระบบคุณภาพและการรักษาสิ่งแวดล้อมตั้งแต่ต้นน้ำจนถึงปลายน้ำ ดิทโต้ได้นำเสนอทางเลือกสุดคุ้มด้วยเครื่องถ่ายเอกสาร ‘รีคอนดิชั่น’ (Recondition) ที่ได้รับการปรับสภาพตามมาตรฐาน ISO ขั้นสูง โดยไม่เพียงมีข้อดีในเรื่องต้นทุนที่ต่ำลง แต่ยังช่วยรักษาสิ่งแวดล้อมด้วยการลดขยะอิเล็กทรอนิกส์และเป็นการใช้ทรัพยากรอย่างคุ้มค่าสูงสุด             สินค้าและบริการที่หลากหลายครบครัน ประกอบกับทีมช่างเทคนิคผู้เชี่ยวชาญ ตลอดจนบริการก่อน ระหว่าง และหลังการขายที่แข็งแกร่งของดิทโต้ ช่วยให้ลูกค้าสามารถบริหารงานเอกสารได้อย่างเต็มประสิทธิภาพและไร้กังวล ส่งผลให้เกิดความได้เปรียบในการแข่งขันทางธุรกิจ เพิ่มศักยภาพในการดำเนินงาน ลดการสูญเสียเวลาและลดต้นทุนค่าใช้จ่ายลงได้อย่างชัดเจน …การมีส่วนผลักดันธุรกิจของลูกค้าให้ก้าวไปสู่การเติบโตที่มั่นคงและความสำเร็จอย่างยั่งยืนเช่นนี้ คือ ความภาคภูมิใจที่เป็นพลังขับเคลื่อนให้ดิทโต้มุ่งมั่นพัฒนาต่อไปอย่างไม่หยุดยั้ง บริษัท ดิทโต้ (ประเทศไทย) จำกัด (มหาชน)  ผู้ให้บริการเพื่อตอบสนองต่อความต้องการของลูกค้าในทุกมิติ ทั้งในด้านเครื่องพิมพ์ ซอฟต์แวร์จัดการเอกสารแบบอิเล็กทรอนิกส์ และงานสแกนเอกสาร  รวมถึงกลุ่มบริษัทฯ ที่ให้บริการงานด้านวิศวกรรมสาขาต่างๆ อย่างรอบด้าน ครอบคลุมตั้งแต่การศึกษา ออกแบบ จัดหา ติดตั้ง และทดสอบระบบ การจัดทำแผนการบริหารการจัดการทรัพยากร การศึกษา จัดทำและประยุกต์แบบจำลองทางคณิตศาสตร์ การบริหารโครงการและบำรุงรักษา ตลอดจนการควบคุมงานก่อสร้างโครงการ     มีความประสงค์จะรับบุคลากรจำนวนมาก เพื่อรองรับการเข้าสู่การเป็นบริษัทมหาชน ดังต่อไปนี้

Responsibilities

About the Team ByteDance Networking brings together innovative ideas and technologies from network architecture, software-defined networking (SDN), network virtualization, switch software and hardware co-design, and high-speed networking, to create hyperscale data-center networking solutions that power several of the most popular apps of the world such as TikTok which serve billions of users around the globe. ByteDance Networking is responsible for designing, building, and operating the global, intelligent network infrastructure to meet the requirements of high availability, scalability, and high-performance. By joining this team, you will gain marketable network experience in multiple areas on a massive scale.

Responsibilities

Design, build, operate and optimize ByteDance's global network, including backbone, data center, public cloud and Edge/CDN.
Work with cross-functional teams including but not limited to compute, storage, database, recommendation system, drive the innovation and evolution of ByteDance network.
Work with external vendors and ISPs for device and carrier selection, perform testing and verification.
Travel may be required up to 15%
30% of the time.

Qualifications

Minimum Qualifications:

Bachelor's in Computer Science, Information Science, Engineering, Mathematics, or a related field, or experience equivalent to a Bachelor's degree based on three or more years of work experience
Good understanding of network protocols including TCP/IP, DHCP, BGP, OSPF/IS-IS and MPLS related technologies.
Good understanding of network monitoring protocols and tools, such as SNMP, Sflow/netflow, Telemetry.
Familiar with data center network architecture, such as CLOS.
Hands-on experience of major network devices, such as Cisco, Arista, Juniper, H3C, Huawei and other mainstream vendors.
Team player and participate ByteDance network global on call rotation.
English and Thai Languages are required to communicate with overseas and local colleagues on a daily workflow Preferred Qualifications:
In-depth knowledge of network protocols and implementation in hyper scale data center networks.
In-depth knowledge of MPLS related Traffic Engineering technologies, such as Segment Routing, RSVP, and LDP etc.
In-depth knowledge of public cloud architecture, such as AWS, GCP, Azure, Ali Cloud, OCI, etc.
Familiar with mainstream commercial switch/router chipsets, such as Broadcom, Barefoot etc.
Good understanding of IPv6 and IPv4-IPv6 co-existence technologies.
Programming/scripting in Python or other languages.

About Us

Founded in 2012, ByteDance's mission is to inspire creativity and enrich life. Inspiring creativity is at the core of ByteDance's mission. Our innovative products are built to help people authentically express themselves, discover and connect - and our global, diverse teams make that possible. Together, we create value for our communities, inspire creativity and enrich life - a mission we work towards every day.

As ByteDancers, we strive to do great things with great people. We lead with curiosity, humility, and a desire to make impact in a rapidly growing tech company. By constantly iterating and fostering an "Always Day 1" mindset, we achieve meaningful breakthroughs for ourselves, our Company, and our users. When we create and grow together, the possibilities are limitless. Join us.

Diversity & Inclusion

ByteDance is committed to creating an inclusive space where employees are valued for their skills, experiences, and unique perspectives. Our platform connects people from across the globe and so does our workplace. At ByteDance, our mission is to inspire creativity and enrich life. To achieve that goal, we are committed to celebrating our diverse voices and to creating an environment that reflects the many communities we reach. We are passionate about this and hope you are too.

Job_Title: Data Scientist II - QuantumBlack, AI by McKinsey
Full_Description:
Your Impact


You will work on real-world, high-impact projects across a variety of industries.

You will have the opportunity to collaborate with QuantumBlack, AI by McKinsey and the QuantumBlack Labs team and build complex and innovative ML systems to accelerate our work in AI and help solve business problems at speed and scale.

You will experience the best environment to grow as a technologist and a leader. You will develop a sought-after perspective connecting technology and business value by working on real-life problems across a variety of industries and technical challenges to serve our clients on their changing needs.

You will be surrounded by inspiring individuals as part of diverse and multidisciplinary teams. You will develop a holistic perspective of AI by partnering with the best design, technical, and business talent in the world as your team members.

While we advocate for using the right tech for the right task, we often leverage the following technologies: Python, PySpark, the PyData stack, SQL, Airflow, Databricks, our own open-source data pipelining framework called Kedro, Dask/RAPIDS, container technologies such as Docker and Kubernetes, cloud solutions such as AWS, GCP, and Azure, and more.

As a Data Scientist in Thailand, you will:

Partner with our clients, from data owners and users to C-level executives, to understand their needs and build impactful analytics solutions
Contribute to cross-functional problem-solving sessions with your team and deliver presentations to colleagues and clients
Translate business problems into analytical problems and develop models aimed at solving our clients’ and users’ problems and ensure they are evaluated with the relevant metrics
Write highly optimized code to advance our internal Data Science Toolbox
Add real-world impact to your academic expertise, as you are encouraged to write papers and present at meetings and conferences should you wish
Take part in R&D projects; attend conferences such as NIPS and ICML as well as data science retrospectives where you will have the opportunity to share and learn from your co-workers
Work in one of the most advanced data science teams globally
Work on the frameworks and libraries that our teams of data scientists and data engineers use to progress from data to impact
Guide global companies through data science solutions to transform their businesses and enhance performance across industries including healthcare, automotive, energy and elite sport

You will work with other data scientists, data engineers, machine learning engineers, designers and project managers on interdisciplinary projects, using math, stats and machine learning to derive structure and knowledge from raw data across various industry sectors.

Your Growth


Driving lasting impact and building long-term capabilities with our clients is not easy work. You are the kind of person who thrives in a high performance/high reward culture - doing hard things, picking yourself up when you stumble, and having the resilience to try another way forward.

In return for your drive, determination, and curiosity, we'll provide the resources, mentorship, and opportunities you need to become a stronger leader faster than you ever thought possible. Your colleagues—at all levels—will invest deeply in your development, just as much as they invest in delivering exceptional results for clients. Every day, you'll receive apprenticeship, coaching, and exposure that will accelerate your growth in ways you won’t find anywhere else.

When you join us, you will have:

Continuous learning: Our learning and apprenticeship culture, backed by structured programs, is all about helping you grow while creating an environment where feedback is clear, actionable, and focused on your development. The real magic happens when you take the input from others to heart and embrace the fast-paced learning experience, owning your journey.
A voice that matters: From day one, we value your ideas and contributions. You’ll make a tangible impact by offering innovative ideas and practical solutions, all while upholding our unwavering commitment to ethics and integrity. We not only encourage diverse perspectives, but they are critical in driving us toward the best possible outcomes.
Global community: With colleagues across 65+ countries and over 100 different nationalities, our firm’s diversity fuels creativity and helps us come up with the best solutions for our clients. Plus, you’ll have the opportunity to learn from exceptional colleagues with diverse backgrounds and experiences.
World-class benefits: On top of a competitive salary (based on your location, experience, and skills), we provide a comprehensive benefits package to enable holistic well-being for you and your family.
YOUR QUALIFICATIONS AND SKILLS

Bachelor's, master's or PhD level in a discipline such as computer science, machine learning, applied statistics, mathematics, engineering or artificial intelligence 
2+ years of professional experience in applying machine learning and data mining techniques to real problems with copious amounts of data 
Programming experience (focus on machine learning): SQL and Python’s Data Science stack are a must; good knowledge of at least one big data framework (PySpark, Hive, Hadoop) is a plus; R, SPSS, SAS (nice to have); software engineering is a plus 
Ability to prototype statistical analysis and modeling algorithms and apply these algorithms for data driven solutions to problems in new domains 
Experience deploying technology applied to business problems is a plus 
Knowledge in applying machine learning solutions to real problems with complex and/or big amounts of data 
Knowledge of prompt engineering & generative AI application building (RAG, Agentic systems); understanding engineering standards, QA/Risk Management 
Willingness to travel

Who We Are

At Kyndryl, we design, build, manage and modernize the mission-critical technology systems that the world depends on every day. So why work at Kyndryl? We are always moving forward – always pushing ourselves to go further in our efforts to build a more equitable, inclusive world for our employees, our customers and our communities.


The Role

Join Kyndryl as an Application Consultant and become a catalyst for innovation and transformation. In this role, you'll be at the forefront of driving change and enabling our customers to harness the power of technology to achieve their wildest ambitions. From revolutionizing healthcare to shaping the future of finance, you'll collaborate with a diverse range of industries, tailoring cutting-edge solutions to meet each customer's unique needs. 
 

We’re looking for a L2 Cloud Application Support Lead who combines strong technical expertise with a warm, supportive leadership style. In this role, you will take ownership of L2 incidents, ensure the stability of our business applications, contribute to our cloud engineering efforts, and help our team grow in both skills and confidence.

Key Responsibilities

Take ownership of L2 application issues, including escalations from L1, and drive them to resolution within SLA.
Troubleshoot application problems using logs, SQL queries, API checks, and system monitoring tools.
Coordinate with L3, development, infrastructure, and vendor teams for complex or recurring issues.
Support releases, patches, and scheduled maintenance by validating and monitoring application behavior.
Expertise within specific technology domain areas (e.g., software development, cloud computing, systems engineering, infrastructure, security, networking, data & analytics)
Enterprise IT application experience
Hands-on experience in at least one of the following: DevOps engineering, systems administration, or systems architecture in public cloud AWS domain
Hands-on experience in Infrastructure as Code (IaC) with Terraform, Ansible, Jenkins.
In-depth knowledge of Windows, Linux Operating Systems, Containers Platform (EKS, OCP).
Must have experience driving for engineering solutions and working across teams
Extensive experience and judgment to plan and accomplish goals
Ability to apply general rules to specific problems to produce conclusions and responses.
Ability to communicate effectively, both verbal and written
Strong process improvement experience
Ability to provide public cloud capacity planning and cost optimization


Your Future at Kyndryl
As an Application Consultant at Kyndryl you will join the Kyndryl Consultant Profession, working with other Kyndryl Consultants, Architects, Project Managers, and cross-functional Technical Subject Matter Experts – presenting unlimited opportunities with unmatched support through our investment in your learning, training, and career growth.


Who You Are

You’re good at what you do and possess the required experience to prove it. However, equally as important – you have a growth mindset; keen to drive your own personal and professional development. You are customer-focused – someone who prioritizes customer success in their work. And finally, you’re open and borderless – naturally inclusive in how you work with others.

Required Skills and Experience

At least 3 - 6 years in depth knowledge of Amazon cloud hosting architecture with experience with AWS and Azure is a bonus
Exceptional judgment and decision-making abilities
Familiar with a variety of IT concepts, practices, and procedures
Knowledge of design techniques, tools, and principals involved in production of precision technical plans, blueprints, drawings, and models
Logic and reasoning to identify the strengths and weaknesses of alternative solutions, conclusions, or approaches to problems
Strong analytical and problem-solving skills with high attention to detail
Comfort working with monitoring tools like Splunk, AppDynamics, or Dynatrace.
Preferred Technical and Professional Experience
A warm leadership style—someone who supports the team, encourages collaboration, and stays steady under pressure.
Strong communication, problem-solving skills, and a proactive approach.
Ability to analyze system logs, troubleshoot performance issues, and identify root causes.


Being You

Diversity is a whole lot more than what we look like or where we come from, it’s how we think and who we are. We welcome people of all cultures, backgrounds, and experiences. But we’re not doing it single-handily: Our Kyndryl Inclusion Networks are only one of many ways we create a workplace where all Kyndryls can find and provide support and advice. This dedication to welcoming everyone into our company means that Kyndryl gives you – and everyone next to you – the ability to bring your whole self to work, individually and collectively, and support the activation of our equitable culture. That’s the Kyndryl Way.


What You Can Expect

With state-of-the-art resources and Fortune 100 clients, every day is an opportunity to innovate, build new capabilities, new relationships, new processes, and new value. Kyndryl cares about your well-being and prides itself on offering benefits that give you choice, reflect the diversity of our employees and support you and your family through the moments that matter – wherever you are in your life journey. Our employee learning programs give you access to the best learning in the industry to receive certifications, including Microsoft, Google, Amazon, Skillsoft, and many more. Through our company-wide volunteering and giving platform, you can donate, start fundraisers, volunteer, and search over 2 million non-profit organizations.  At Kyndryl, we invest heavily in you, we want you to succeed so that together, we will all succeed.

Get Referred!

If you know someone that works at Kyndryl, when asked ‘How Did You Hear About Us’ during the application process, select ‘Employee Referral’ and enter your contact's Kyndryl email address.

About Igloo


Igloo (formerly Axinan) is the first full-stack insurtech firm to emerge from Singapore. With offices across Singapore, Indonesia, Thailand, the Philippines, Vietnam, Malaysia, China and India, Igloo is fueled by a mission of making insurance accessible and affordable for all. Igloo's innovation solutions empower companies to eliminate operational risk, drive new revenue streams and optimise and enhance their existing products and services. With a successful Pre-Series C fund round of US$36 million in Dec 2023, Igloo has now raised over US$100 million. The leading regional insurtech firm looks to expand regionally with strategic acquisitions and hiring great talent.

As a passionate team building meaningful solutions to make an impact, we are looking for like-minded individuals to join us at Igloo. At our core, we prioritise teamwork and foster a culture built on strong collaboration and we are looking for talented people like you.

Role Summary: The Technical Owner


The Regional Solutions Architect is the foundational technical resource responsible for the design, integrity, and successful deployment of Igloo Tech Solutions for our enterprise clients across the Asia Pacific region. This role acts as the technical bridge, translating complex client needs (especially from financial services and insurance giants) into deployable solutions using our modular, AI-powered platform.

You will play a direct role in commercial growth by winning the technical argument and ensuring a clean handoff to delivery, taking ownership of the solution from the first demo through to the initial project phase.

Key Responsibilities & Functions
A. Technical Sales & Solution Design 

Solution Blueprinting: Lead technical discovery sessions to deeply understand client pain points (e.g., related to legacy systems, operational inefficiency, or distribution gaps) and design the optimal technical solution blueprint leveraging Igloo's platform (Turbo, UIP, UCP, etc.).
High-Fidelity Demos: Conduct compelling, tailored product demonstrations and technical workshops for executive (CTO, Head of Digital) and technical audiences, focusing on architecture, integration, security, and scalability.
RFP & Proposal Leadership: Strategically manage the technical component of all Requests for Proposals (RFPs), Requests for Information (RFIs), and commercial proposals, ensuring absolute accuracy and a clear technical rationale for the proposed solution.
Technical Vetting: Serve as the technical point-of-contact, addressing all due diligence questions related to system integration, API architecture, data security (e.g., PII handling), and cloud deployment models.
B. Project Execution & Delivery Support (Startup Ownership)

Project Scoping & Handoff: Own the transition from sales to implementation. Provide the Project Management team with detailed, signed-off technical specifications, effort estimates, and risk logs to ensure a smooth, low-friction technical kickoff.
Project Support: In a startup capacity, provide necessary technical support during the early delivery phase, guiding the client and internal teams on architectural decisions, integration sequencing, and initial configuration.
Mitigation & Troubleshooting: Proactively identify potential technical blockers or scope risks during the pre-sales process (e.g., as learned from projects like CIMB PH and AmMetLife MY) and work with technical teams to define mitigation strategies before they impact delivery timelines.
C. Product Strategy & Market Intelligence

Requirements Loop: Systematically capture, structure, and prioritize client feedback and functional gaps identified during the GTM process.
Roadmap Influence: Act as the voice of the APAC client and market, collaborating closely with Product Managers to translate commercial opportunities and competitor intelligence (GTM and product features) into actionable input for the core product roadmap, especially around AI and data capabilities (e.g., AI Claims assistance, AI Sales assistance).
Enablement: Develop and maintain technical collateral, including architecture diagrams, integration guides, and internal competitive battlecards to enable the wider Commercial team.

Requirements

A. Experience

Minimum 5+ years in a client-facing technical role (Solutions Architect, Technical Solutions Engineer, or Principal Consultant) within an Enterprise B2B SaaS company.
Deep domain expertise working with Financial Services and Insurance carriers in the APAC region.
Proven track record of success supporting a sales team to achieve targets in complex, multi-stakeholder enterprise deals.
B. Technical & Architectural Skills

Strong conceptual understanding of modular SaaS platforms that are configurable (not custom-coded) and delivered via a robust API-first strategy.
Proficient in discussing system integrations, data models, cloud environments, AI implementations, and enterprise security protocols.
Familiarity with the insurance value chain (distribution, policy admin, claims) and how technology (like Igloo's Tech Solutions) can be implemented alongside or parallel to legacy core systems.
C. The Startup Mindset (Critical for Success)

Owner-Operator: Demonstrated history of taking end-to-end ownership of technical solutions from initial concept to successful project handoff.
Proactivity & Bias for Action: Must be a self-starter with the curiosity to constantly learn about new market trends (e.g., embedded insurance, digital banks) and emerging technology (AI/ML) to develop new solution ideas.
Exceptional Communication: Highly articulate and able to bridge the communication gap between business (commercial team, client executives) and deep technical teams (engineers, security team).
Agile Acumen: Experience working within an agile or fast-paced delivery environment, understanding the balance between architectural perfection and speed-to-market.

Key Responsibilities

Customer Engagement & Solution Design

Work directly with enterprise customers to understand business challenges and translate them into

scalable AI architectures

Design end-to-end AI and agentic systems that are secure, reliable, and production-ready

Act as the technical owner of customer engagements, driving architecture decisions across

performance, cost, and scalability

Agentic AI & Platform Implementation

Architect and deploy multi-agent systems where AI agents collaborate to solve complex business

workflows

Build solutions leveraging LLMs, RAG pipelines, and enterprise data systems

Integrate AI into CRM, ERP, and operational workflows to enable real business impact

Ensure strong governance, observability, and security across all deployments

POC to Production Execution

Lead customers through Stratova’s 3-phase execution model (Ideate → Build → Scale)

Develop and validate POCs and prototypes, ensuring both technical feasibility and business

value

Drive production deployment and scaling, ensuring systems operate reliably in real environments

Optimize performance across latency, cost, and model accuracy

Basic Qualifications

7+ years of experience in solutions architecture, cloud, or AI/ML engineering

Strong hands-on experience designing and deploying AI/ML or Generative AI systems

Experience building scalable, secure, and production-grade architectures

Strong programming or system design experience (Python, APIs, distributed systems, etc.)

Ability to translate complex technical concepts into business outcomes for stakeholders

Preferred Qualifications

Experience with LLMs, RAG, vector databases, and agentic frameworks

Exposure to multi-agent systems and AI-driven automation workflows

Experience working with enterprise customers in industries like FSI, Retail, Healthcare,

Manufacturing, or Technology

Familiarity with MLOps / LLMOps / AgentOps practices

Strong presentation and storytelling skills, with experience engaging C-level stakeholders

Experience contributing to technical communities, blogs, or public speaking

Job_Title: Security Engineer - Fresh Graduate are welcome
Full_Description:
Job Description

1. Lead and manage the design, deployment, and configuration of security solutions in assigned domains of expertise (e.g., network, application/data, endpoint, or platform security), ensuring alignment with client requirements and industry best practices.

2. Oversee and coordinate Corrective Maintenance, ensuring timely troubleshooting, root-cause analysis, and sustainable fixes.

3. Manage Preventive Maintenance activities - conduct proactive health checks, optimize performance, and schedule upgrades.

4. Direct Incident Management processes, including triage, escalation, resolution, and post-incident analysis.

5. Provide strategic consulting to clients on security architecture, governance, and compliance requirements.

6. Collaborate with cross-functional and project teams to ensure successful delivery within scope, timeline, and SLA.

7. Maintain technical documentation, including designs, configurations, maintenance records, and incident report

Qualifications

1.Education: Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, IT, Cybersecurity, or a related field.All Levels

2.Experience: Fresh graduates or candidates with 0–1 year of IT/security-related experience are welcome. Candidates with a minimum of 5 years in IT security engineering and at least 2 years at a senior/lead level are highly preferred.All Levels

3.Technical Knowledge: Basic knowledge of networking fundamentals, operating systems, and information security concepts. Strong, in-depth knowledge and experience leading solution delivery will be prioritized.All Levels

4.Certifications: Holding at least one foundational-level security certification (e.g., CompTIA Security+, EC-Council) or vendor/product-specific security credential (e.g., Palo Alto, Fortinet, CheckPoint, F5 Networks, etc.) is a significant advantage/requirement for senior roles.Good-to-Have (Must-Have for Senior)

5.Frameworks/Compliance: Familiarity with compliance frameworks such as ISO/IEC 27001, PCI-DSS, NIST, and applicable regulatory standards. Strong knowledge in incident, problem, and change management under the ITIL framework is required for senior roles.All Levels (Required for Senior)

6.Soft Skills: Good communication, teamwork, and analytical problem-solving skills. Excellent leadership and management skills are required for senior roles.All Levels

7.Accountability/Attitude: Service-minded with high responsibility and accountability for assigned tasks. Willingness to learn and work across multiple security domains.All Levels

8.Language: Ability to read and understand technical documentation in English; conversational proficiency is an advantage. Proficiency in English for technical documentation and client interaction is mandatory for senior roles.

Cube is an e-commerce market data & insights startup that moves like a product company. As our Lead Developer transitions into a dedicated Product role, we are looking for a Full-Stack Developer to take the reins of our technical execution.

You will be the bridge between our massive backend datasets (Postgres/Snowflake) and the high-performance interfaces our clients rely on (Next.js). We need someone who can translate complex data architecture into seamless user experiences.

Responsibilities

Offload the Backend: Take ownership of API development and database interactions. You aren't just querying data; you are optimizing queries and designing schemas in Postgres.
Save the Frontend: Our UI is built in Next.js. You will build features, optimize rendering performance (SSR/ISR), and ensure the frontend code is clean and scalable.
Scale the System: We currently use a Monorepo. You will help us decide how and when to decouple services as we grow.
Collaborate: You will work with Data Analysts (who handle the math) and integrate their work into the production app.
Keep the Lights On: Occasional maintenance of our information site (WordPress) and email service configuration.

Requirements

Strong Foundation: You understand how a database works (Indexes, Foreign Keys, SQL optimization) not just how to use an ORM.
Next.js Expert: You know the difference between Client Components and Server Components and when to use which.
Architecture Mindset: You write code that is easy to delete and replace. You understand the pros/cons of Monorepos vs. Microservices.
Python Literacy: You don't need to be a Python expert, but you need to be able to read an analyst's script and ask AI to help you debug it if it fails.
Tools: TypeScript, Postgres, Git, Docker.

Job_Title: Full Stack Programmer (Java Spring Boot / React)
Full_Description:
ออกแบบ พัฒนา และดูแลระบบ Web Application โดยใช้ Java Spring Boot สำหรับ Backend

พัฒนาและดูแล Frontend ด้วย React + TypeScript/JavaScript

ออกแบบฐานข้อมูล และเขียน Query ให้มีประสิทธิภาพ (รองรับ MySQL, PostgreSQL, MsSQL)

ทำงานร่วมกับทีม QA, DevOps และ System Analyst เพื่อส่งมอบงานที่มีคุณภาพ

ดูแล pipeline สำหรับ CI/CD และบริหาร source code ผ่าน GitLab

Deploy และจัดการระบบบน AWS Cloud

เขียนเอกสารระบบ (System & API documentation)

คุณสมบัติ (Qualifications)

ปริญญาตรีหรือสูงกว่า สาขาคอมพิวเตอร์ วิศวกรรมคอมพิวเตอร์ เทคโนโลยีสารสนเทศ หรือสาขาที่เกี่ยวข้อง

มีประสบการณ์พัฒนาโปรแกรมด้วย Java (Spring Boot Framework) อย่างน้อย 3 ปี

มีประสบการณ์ใน Frontend Framework เช่น React (พร้อม TypeScript หรือ JavaScript)

เข้าใจหลักการออกแบบระบบเชิงวัตถุ (OOP) และ RESTful API

มีความรู้ด้าน ฐานข้อมูล SQL (MySQL, PostgreSQL, หรือ MsSQL)

มีประสบการณ์ใช้เครื่องมือ Git/GitLab และเข้าใจการทำงานแบบ Branching/Version Control

เข้าใจหลักการของ CI/CD pipeline และ DevOps tools

มีความเข้าใจพื้นฐานเกี่ยวกับ AWS Cloud Services (เช่น EC2, ECS, S3, RDS, OpenSearch)

มีทักษะในการสื่อสารและทำงานเป็นทีม

หากมีความรู้ด้าน Docker, Kubernetes, หรือ Microservices จะพิจารณาเป็นพิเศษ

.NET Full Stack Engineer

We are on the lookout for a .NET Engineer to join the team. If you feel highly motivated, detail-oriented, and not afraid to try new things, we would really love to meet you. You will be part of a brilliant web development team, so you must be a problem-solver, a fast learner, and comfortable wearing many hats.

4+ years of experience developing Web Applications
.NET Core, ASP.NET MVC, Entity Framework
JavaScript/TypeScript (React and/or Angular)
A passion for continuous learning and self-improvement

Propel operational success with your expertise in technology support and a commitment to continuous improvement.

Encourage a culture of continuous improvement as you troubleshoot, maintain, identify, escalate, and resolve production service interruptions for all internally and externally developed systems, leading to a seamless user experience.

Job responsibilities

Provides end-to-end application or infrastructure service delivery to enable successful business operations of the firm

3+ years of experience or equivalent expertise troubleshooting, resolving, and maintaining information technology services

Experience in observability and monitoring tools and techniques

Strong analytical and troubleshooting skills
Excellent verbal and written communication skills
Ability to work independently and as part of a team

Basic scripting or programming knowledge (e.g., Python, PowerShell).
Understanding of networking concepts and cloud environments.

Electrolux Professional
About Electrolux Professional

Electrolux Professional is a global leader in food, beverage, and laundry solutions for professional users. We don’t just sell machines—we deliver performance, sustainability, and peace of mind. Our laundry solutions are trusted by hotels, healthcare facilities, and commercial laundries worldwide for their reliability, efficiency, and smart design.
We’re now looking for a Pre-Sales Manager to join our APAC team and help bring our laundry innovations to life across the region.

Your Mission

As a Pre-Sales Manager, you’ll be the technical backbone of our sales efforts—translating customer needs into tailored, high-performing laundry solutions. You’ll work closely with consultants, architects, and our sales teams to ensure every project is designed for success, from the first sketch to the final installation.

What You’ll Be Doing
1. Designing Smart Laundry Spaces

- Collaborate with clients and partners to understand their operational needs and translate them into efficient laundry layouts.
- Use tools like AutoCAD and Revit (nice to have) to create detailed, MEP-ready designs that reflect Electrolux’s high standards of ergonomics, hygiene, and sustainability.
- Maintain and evolve our digital design library to support consultants and planners across the region.

2. Being the Technical Voice of Electrolux

- Support the sales team with technical insights, equipment sizing, and solution recommendations.
- Present our value proposition in a way that resonates with both technical and non-technical audiences.
- Benchmark our solutions against competitors and clearly articulate why Electrolux is the smarter choice.

3. Building Relationships That Last

- Act as a trusted advisor to consultants, architects, and key accounts—helping them navigate complex projects with confidence.
- Provide training and technical onboarding for new partners and internal teams.
- Stay close to the market to identify new opportunities and emerging trends.

What You Bring

- Education: Degree in Mechanical Engineering, Industrial Design, or a related technical field.
- Experience: At least 3 years in a technical sales, pre-sales, or engineering support role—ideally in commercial laundry, foodservice, or building systems.
- Technical Skills:
  - Proficient in AutoCAD and Revit (nice to have).
  - Strong understanding of laundry workflows, equipment sizing, and MEP coordination.
- Soft Skills:
  - Clear communicator with a knack for simplifying complex ideas.
  - Collaborative mindset and a proactive approach to problem-solving.
  - Comfortable working across cultures and time zones in a fast-paced environment.
- Languages: Fluent in English; other APAC languages are a plus.

Why Join Us?

- Be part of a global brand with a strong legacy and a bold vision for the future.
- Work on diverse, high-impact projects across the APAC region.
- Enjoy a flexible, people-first culture that values innovation and integrity.
- Competitive compensation, performance incentives, and regional travel opportunities.




REQUIRED COMPETENCES

Customer Obsessed - you are focused on delivering value to the customers, both internal and external

Trustworthy – you are accountable and deliver on your commitments. You welcome healthy debates and honest conversations. You are honest - especially about your mistakes and learn from your setbacks. You collaborate and enable others to deliver.

Bold - You take action to deliver better outcome. You seek diversity and inclusion by actively pursuing diverse perspectives and creating an inclusive environment. You bring new ideas to the table and take risks with confidence, supporting courageous decision-making that inspires progress and growth.

Sustainable – You consider the growth and development of our people to be as important as preserving our environment and take decisions that reflect our effort to build a better future. You always act ethically.
 

ABOUT OUR BENEFITS:

Fair compensation and benefits package in line with the market

Room to express your potential, develop and strengthen your competences

Continuous learning opportunities

Diversified, multi-cultural environment

• สามารถสื่อสารภาษาจีนได้ จะพิจารณาเป็นพิเศษ

- มีประสบการณ์พัฒนา Web Application จะได้รับการพิจารณาเป็นพิเศษ

- สามารถสื่อสารและประสานงานได้ดี

- ยินดีรับนักศึกษาจบใหม่

- วางแผน ออกแบบ พัฒนาโปรแกรม ดำเนินการทดสอบระบบ และจัดทำคู่มือการพัฒนาโปรแกรม

- บำรุงรักษาโปรแกรม (Program Maintenance)

Job Description:

Present solutions and manage expectations at all levels




Qualifications:

5+ years as Product Owner or Business Analyst

3+ years in Financial Services / FinTech / Banking / Insurance

Strong knowledge of SDLC and Agile methodologies

About the Role


As an AI Engineer on our Enterprise Systems team, you will be embedded directly in the trenches of our most strategic enterprise accounts. You'll take AI from proof of concept to production, navigate the chaos of real customer environments, and make complex agentic systems actually deliver business outcomes.

This is a consulting and hands-on delivery role. You will write production-grade code, architect intelligent agent workflows, debug pipelines at midnight before a go-live, and then walk into a boardroom the next morning to explain what you built and why it matters.

You'll own the full arc — from discovery and design through deployment and adoption — and your success is measured by one thing: does the customer's business actually change because of the AI you delivered?

If you love AI deeply, want to get your hands dirty across the entire delivery lifecycle, and feel equally at home talking to a team and writing LLM orchestration logic, this role was written for you.

What You'll Do


Enterprise AI Delivery

Embed with enterprise customers to understand their workflows, data environments, and operational constraints — and build AI solutions that fit their reality, not a sanitized sandbox
Own implementations end-to-end: from scoping and solution design through integration, testing, deployment, and handoff
Rapidly diagnose technical blockers — messy data, broken integrations, edge cases, legacy system quirks — and solve them yourself without waiting on a queue

Agentic AI Engineering

Design, build, and orchestrate multi-step AI agents that automate complex workflows across enterprise systems
Work with frameworks like LangGraph, LangChain, or similar to architect reliable, production-ready agentic pipelines
Apply sound judgment about what should be automated vs. what requires human-in-the-loop, and design accordingly
Continuously tune agent behavior based on real-world usage patterns you observe in the field

Technical Breadth

Build custom integrations, connectors, and data pipelines to bridge enterprise tech stacks with AI infrastructure
Work across the stack — APIs, vector databases, LLM APIs, cloud infrastructure, and front-end surfaces — to deliver complete, working systems
Write clean, maintainable code that others can build on top of

Product & Feedback Loop

Identify patterns across customer engagements that signal genuine product opportunities — and advocate for them with engineering and product teams with precision
Contribute to building internal tooling and repeatable delivery assets (deployment templates, agent blueprints, evaluation frameworks) that make the next implementation faster
Optionally: take ownership of building product features or internal tools that emerge from your field insights

Requirements

Must-Haves

3+ years of software engineering experience, with at least 1–2 years focused on AI/ML systems in production environments
Hands-on experience building with LLMs (OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, or open-source models) — prompt engineering, RAG pipelines, fine-tuning, evaluation
Experience designing and deploying agentic AI workflows — multi-step reasoning, tool use, memory, planning
Strong programming skills in Python; comfortable with APIs, cloud services (AWS/GCP/Azure), and enterprise databases
Proven ability to work directly with enterprise customers or technical stakeholders — you can translate complexity into clarity
End-to-end ownership mindset: you're not done when the code ships; you're done when the customer succeeds

Strong Signals We'll Look For

You've debugged a production AI system that was misbehaving inside a customer's environment and fixed it under pressure
You've built something agentic that actually ran in production — not just a toy demo
You have opinions about AI system design, and you can back them up with experience
You've identified a customer problem that became a product feature
You've shipped something end-to-end — a product, a tool, a system — that you designed yourself from scratch
The Kind of Person Who Thrives Here

Genuinely obsessed with AI. You follow the field closely, experiment constantly, and have strong convictions about where it's going
Builder-first. When you see a problem, your instinct is to build a solution — not write a requirements doc and wait
Comfortable with ambiguity. Enterprise environments are messy. You adapt fast, learn from what you observe, and iterate in real time
Outcome-driven. You measure success by customer impact, not lines of code or tickets closed

Low ego, high ownership. You'll do what it takes — including the unglamorous work — to get something across the finish line

Pay 100% for Job-related Training Courses

Job_Title: Data Analyst / Business Analyst (Looker – Google Cloud)
Full_Description:
About the Role

We are looking for a highly skilled Data Analyst / Business Analyst with strong experience in building enterprise-level BI dashboards using Looker (Looker Cloud Core on Google Cloud). The ideal candidate must be proficient in LookML, data modeling, and transforming business requirements into actionable insights.

You will collaborate closely with Data Engineering, Product, Business, and Leadership teams to develop data-driven solutions that support strategic decision-making across the organization.




Key Responsibilities

Design, develop, and maintain BI dashboards using Looker Cloud Core (Google Cloud).

Build and maintain LookML models, including Views, Explores, and Data Layers.

Gather business requirements and translate them into well-structured data models and dashboards.

Analyze business data, develop insights, and provide data-driven recommendations.

Collaborate with Data Engineers to ensure efficient data pipelines and optimized datasets for Looker.

Conduct data validation, quality checks, and troubleshoot LookML or dashboard issues.

Support Looker users including onboarding, permissions, and user adoption.

Maintain documentation such as Data Dictionaries, Metric Definitions, and Dashboard Guidelines.

Build KPI frameworks and ensure consistent usage of metrics across teams.




Qualifications

Bachelor’s degree in Data Science, Computer Science, Statistics, MIS, Engineering, or related fields.

2–3 years of experience in Data Analysis, Business Analysis, or BI-related roles.

Direct experience working in enterprise-level environments.

Strong proficiency in Looker and LookML (mandatory).

Strong SQL skills (complex joins, window functions, CTEs).

Familiarity with Google Cloud Platform (especially BigQuery).

Understanding of data modeling concepts such as Star Schema and Snowflake Schema.

Strong analytical thinking and ability to translate business requirements into technical solutions.

Experience in designing dashboards that communicate insights clearly and effectively.




Nice to Have

Experience working directly with Data Engineers or Data Scientists.

Basic Python or R skills for data processing or automation.

Position: Mobile Field Test Engineer

Working Place : Bangkok, Yannawa




Job Description:

Responsible for field testing of camera imaging effects on mobile devices (phones/tablets, etc.), including but not limited to:

Conducting real-world shooting tests in various lighting scenarios (e.g., indoor, outdoor, night scenes, backlight, etc.).

Testing basic camera functions (focus, exposure, white balance, color reproduction, etc.).

Evaluating imaging quality in modes such as portrait, landscape, sports, video recording, etc.

Verifying the effects of algorithms for beauty filters, filters, HDR, image stabilization, etc.

Executing test tasks according to test cases and standard operating guidelines, and documenting test results and issues in detail.

Assisting in compiling test reports and issue reports, and collaborating with the R&D team to reproduce, verify, and track issues.

Collecting user feedback from real-world usage scenarios to provide reference for camera imaging optimization.

Participating in test plan discussions and proposing improvement suggestions to enhance testing efficiency and coverage.




Requirements:

Fresh graduates are welcome. Majors in science and engineering are preferred (no restrictions on majors).

Interested in mobile phones, electronic products or software testing. Basic knowledge is sufficient; relevant experience is a plus but not required.

Have basic English reading skills and be able to understand simple technical instructions.

Chinese skills (for communication or reading) are preferred. No relevant work experience is acceptable.

Strong interest in mobile photography, camera technology, or imaging quality assessment. Basic imaging knowledge (e.g., understanding concepts like pixels, aperture, ISO) is a plus.

Diligent and responsible, adaptable to the mobile nature of field testing, and able to handle a certain level of work pressure.

You are not just a product expert; you are a strategic advisor who understands the deep-seated inefficiencies in the manufacturing supply chain. 
You will partner with Field Sales to diagnose customer "pain points," design high-impact use cases, and demonstrate how CADDI’s AI-driven platform transforms "dark data" into measurable ROI.

JOB RESPONSIBILITIES

Pre-Sales Strategy & Execution
Strategic Partnerships: Collaborate closely with the Field Sales team to drive the technical sales cycle from initial discovery to successful trial/POC.
Customized Demos: Design and deliver compelling product demonstrations that speak directly to the customer’s specific operational challenges.
Solution Architecture: Analyze complex customer workflows to identify gaps and introduce potential use cases where CADDI can provide immediate value.
Value Engineering & ROI
ROI Calculation: Develop data-driven financial models to quantify the impact of CADDI on a customer’s bottom line (e.g., reducing procurement costs, minimizing duplicate parts, and accelerating design cycles).
Business Case Development: Help customers build internal buy-in by translating technical features into executive-level business outcomes.
Account Management & Engagement
Relationship Building: Establish yourself as a trusted advisor to key stakeholders, including Procurement Heads, Engineering Managers, and CTOs.
Continuous Engagement: Proactively check in with accounts to gather feedback, address concerns, and ensure the solution remains aligned with their evolving business goals.
Customer Advocacy: Act as a liaison between the customer and our Product team to ensure user feedback informs our future roadmap.
Product & Domain Expertise
Continuous Learning: Maintain an expert-level understanding of CADDI’s products and the underlying AI technology.
Market Intelligence: Stay ahead of industry trends in Industry 4.0, digital transformation, and manufacturing supply chain management.

Your Impact


You will work as a typical McKinsey consultant, leveraging your strong passion for Tech & AI work.

In a team of typically ~3-5 consultants, you will shape and drive end-to-end digital transformations across business, technology, process and people, creating value by reinventing the core of our client's businesses. This work includes gathering and analyzing information, formulating and testing hypotheses, developing and communicating recommendations. You’ll also present results to client management and implement recommendations in collaboration with client team members.

You’ll also gain new skills and build on the strengths you bring to the firm. You will receive exceptional training as well as frequent coaching and mentoring from colleagues on your team.

Your responsibilities will include partnering with our clients, from data owners and users to C-level executives, to understand their needs and build impactful analytics solutions. You will travel to our clients’ offices to deliver presentations, gather information, or share knowledge. You will contribute to cross-functional problem-solving sessions with your team and deliver presentations to colleagues and clients. Additionally, you will translate business problems into analytical problems, develop models aimed at solving our clients’ and users’ problems, and ensure they are evaluated with the relevant metrics.

You will be based in the Bangkok office, working with Tech & AI at McKinsey, which brings together the best of McKinsey’s digital capabilities to help our clients use digital technology to transform their businesses. As part of this group, you’ll join a global team working on everything from AI-led transformation, strategy to agile, cloud, cybersecurity, digital transformation and IT modernization.

You will also collaborate with clients across a diverse range of sectors and industries, working on projects that span various functions. As part of our global team, you'll partner with colleagues from across McKinsey & Company to help clients deliver breakthrough products, experiences, and businesses, covering both technology and non-technology topics like operations, strategy, corporate finance, marketing, and sales etc.

Our office culture empowers us to try new ideas and experiment and are expected to be constantly learning and growing. There is also a strong emphasis on mentoring others in the group, enabling them to grow and learn.

Your Growth


Driving lasting impact and building long-term capabilities with our clients is not easy work. You are the kind of person who thrives in a high performance/high reward culture - doing hard things, picking yourself up when you stumble, and having the resilience to try another way forward.

In return for your drive, determination, and curiosity, we'll provide the resources, mentorship, and opportunities you need to become a stronger leader faster than you ever thought possible. Your colleagues—at all levels—will invest deeply in your development, just as much as they invest in delivering exceptional results for clients. Every day, you'll receive apprenticeship, coaching, and exposure that will accelerate your growth in ways you won’t find anywhere else.

When you join us, you will have:

Continuous learning: Our learning and apprenticeship culture, backed by structured programs, is all about helping you grow while creating an environment where feedback is clear, actionable, and focused on your development. The real magic happens when you take the input from others to heart and embrace the fast-paced learning experience, owning your journey.
A voice that matters: From day one, we value your ideas and contributions. You’ll make a tangible impact by offering innovative ideas and practical solutions, all while upholding our unwavering commitment to ethics and integrity. We not only encourage diverse perspectives, but they are critical in driving us toward the best possible outcomes.
Global community: With colleagues across 65+ countries and over 100 different nationalities, our firm’s diversity fuels creativity and helps us come up with the best solutions for our clients. Plus, you’ll have the opportunity to learn from exceptional colleagues with diverse backgrounds and experiences.
World-class benefits: On top of a competitive salary (based on your location, experience, and skills), we provide a comprehensive benefits package to enable holistic well-being for you and your family.
YOUR QUALIFICATIONS AND SKILLS

Bachelor's degree, ideally either in business (economics, finance, management) or a technical field (engineering, computer science, data science)
2+ years of work experience preferred, leveraging analytics/AI for product growth and management, or in technical roles (data scientists / data engineers / software engineers) 
Outstanding record of academic achievement, with functional knowledge or passion in Digital, Technology and IT, as well as business and strategy
Proven record of leadership in a work setting and/or through extracurricular activities
Ability to work collaboratively in a team environment and effectively with people at all levels in an organization
Willingness to travel
Skills to communicate complex ideas effectively

Job_Title: Senior Data Scientist on Macro-Fiscal Model in Maldives
Full_Description:
Home Base

Expected duration

20 Apr-26 Nov 2026

Duties and Responsibilities

Created in December 1999, the United Nations Office for Disaster Risk Reduction (UNDRR) is the designated focal point in the United Nations system for the coordination of efforts to reduce disasters and to ensure synergies among the disaster reduction activities of the United Nations and regional organizations and activities in both developed and less developed countries. Led by the United Nations Special Representative of the Secretary-General for Disaster Risk Reduction (SRSG), UNDRR has over 150 staff located in its headquarters in Geneva, Switzerland, and in regional offices. Specifically, UNDRR guides, monitors, analyses and reports on progress in the implementation of the Sendai Framework for Disaster Risk Reduction 2015-2030, supports regional and national implementation of the Framework and catalyzes action and increases global awareness to reduce disaster risk working with UN

Member States and a broad range of partners and stakeholders, including civil society, the private sector, parliamentarians and the science and technology community. The Maldives is a small island economy highly dependent on tourism and related services, with total GDP estimated at about USD 7.0 billion in 2024.

Tourism directly contributes roughly 20–30 % of GDP and is the dominant driver of foreign exchange earnings and government revenue, with around 2.05 million tourist arrivals recorded in 2024, a new peak for the country’s tourism sector. Real gross domestic product (GDP) growth has remained positive, with estimates ranging around 3–5 % in recent years, supported by tourism, transport, and communication services. However, the economy continues to face macroeconomic challenges, including inflation pressures, fiscal vulnerabilities, and a high public debt burden exceeding 130 % of GDP, which limits fiscal space for countercyclical and disaster-responsive spending.

Due to its low-lying geography and reliance on coastal and marine-based activities, the Maldives is highly exposed to climate and disaster risks. Coastal flooding, storm surges, and extreme weather events pose significant threats to critical infrastructure sectors such as transport, power, telecommunications, and water systems. Damage to these systems can lead to large direct losses, disruptions in tourism operations and connectivity, and indirect macroeconomic impacts, including reduced output, employment, and government revenue.

The fiscal implications of such disasters are notable, as emergency response, reconstruction, and revenue shortfalls can strain public finances in an already constrained budget environment. The Budget Stress Testing exercise thus aims to systematically assess how disasters translate into direct infrastructure losses and broader macro-fiscal effects, and how preventive investments (e.g., resilient infrastructure, early warning systems) and disaster risk financing instruments (e.g., insurance, contingency funds) can enhance economic stability and fiscal resilience in the Maldives. The consultant will be home based and work under supervision of Economic Affairs Office, UNDRR ROAP.

The consultant will undertake the following tasks: 1. Data Collection and Preparation / Macro-Fiscal Model Development

Collect macroeconomic, fiscal, and infrastructure datasets relevant to the Maldives economy.
Compile historical macroeconomic and fiscal indicators required for macro-fiscal modeling.
Collect and consolidate data related to critical infrastructure systems, including power, transportation, telecommunications, and water infrastructure.
Clean, harmonize, and validate datasets to ensure consistency with national macroeconomic statistics and fiscal accounts.
Develop a structured database to support macro-fiscal modeling.
Design and develop a macro-fiscal modeling framework suitable for Budget Stress Testing in the Maldives.
Calibrate the model using historical macroeconomic and fiscal data.
Establish macroeconomic transmission channels linking infrastructure disruption to macroeconomic and fiscal outcomes.
Model the impacts of infrastructure disruptions on GDP, sectoral activity, fiscal revenues, government expenditures, fiscal balance, and debt dynamics.

2. Catastrophe modeling (CAT Model) Integration

Integrate disaster loss estimates generated from catastrophe risk modeling into the macro-fiscal model.

พัฒนาแผนผังกระบวนการ โมเดลข้อมูล และเอกสารอื่นๆ เพื่อบันทึกและสื่อสารความต้องการทางธุรกิจ

ทำงานร่วมกับทีมงานข้ามสายงาน รวมถึงฝ่ายไอที ฝ่ายปฏิบัติการ และผู้บริหาร เพื่อออกแบบและนำระบบ ERP ไปใช้

ให้การฝึกอบรมและสนับสนุนผู้ใช้ปลายทางเพื่อให้มั่นใจว่าการนำระบบ ERP ไปใช้ประสบความสำเร็จ

ตรวจสอบและปรับปรุงระบบ ERP อย่างต่อเนื่องเพื่อขับเคลื่อนการปรับปรุงอย่างต่อเนื่อง

ความเชี่ยวชาญที่แสดงให้เห็นได้ในเทคนิคการวิเคราะห์ธุรกิจ รวมถึงการทำแผนผังกระบวนการ การสร้างแบบจำลองข้อมูล และการรวบรวมข้อกำหนด

Job Title: Head of IT

Department: IT / Operations
Reporting to: General Manager




Role Summary

The Head of IT is responsible for end-to-end ownership of the company’s IT function, including IT operations, system monitoring, internal systems, and technology project delivery. This role ensures all customer-facing and internal systems—including partner-managed systems under internal oversight—are reliable, well-integrated, and compliant with company policies and regulatory requirements.

The role leads a lean team (MIS Admin and Developer), oversees external vendors and partners, and retains full accountability for system performance, incident management, and IT service delivery. The Head of IT will also provide technical oversight, including review of system configurations and internal cloud environments.




Key Responsibilities

1. IT Ownership, Governance & Strategy

Own overall IT operations, service delivery, and technology direction.

Ensure alignment with business needs, partner-managed systems under internal oversight, and regulatory requirements.

Establish and enforce IT policies, standards, and operating processes.




2. System Monitoring & Incident Management (ITSM)

Own monitoring of all customer-facing and internal systems, including cloud environments (e.g., AWS).

Ensure timely identification, escalation, and resolution of incidents.

Lead incident response for service-related issues, including root cause analysis and preventive actions.

Coordinate with the Head of InfoSec on security-related incidents when applicable.




3. IT Project & Internal Systems Ownership

Lead delivery of IT projects, system enhancements, and internal tools.

Own local system design and integration decisions for internally developed systems.

Ensure proper documentation, UAT, and audit readiness for all changes.




4. Team Leadership & Technical Oversight

Lead and develop MIS Admin and Developer, ensuring clear ownership and accountability.

Provide technical guidance and review configurations (e.g., AWS setup, system architecture) where needed (~10–20% involvement).

Establish structured workflows across IT operations, support, and development.




5. Vendor & Partner Management, Compliance & Risk

Manage and oversee external vendors and partner-managed systems under internal oversight.

Retain full accountability for system performance, service quality, and issue resolution regardless of vendor involvement.

Ensure compliance with company policies, regulatory requirements, and audit standards.

Maintain audit-ready documentation and support internal and external audits.




Key Expectations

Own outcomes, not just coordination.

Act as the primary escalation point for IT-related issues and decisions.

Balance technical understanding with leadership and governance.

Build a scalable, reliable, and audit-ready IT function.




Qualifications

5–7 years of experience in IT operations, IT management, or similar roles.

Strong understanding of system operations, cloud environments (e.g., AWS), and IT workflows.

Experience managing vendors and partner-managed systems under internal oversight.

Ability to lead incident response and drive problem resolution.

Good understanding of IT governance, risk, and compliance concepts.

Strong communication skills in English and Thai.




Bonus Points for:

Professional certification related to IT System Administration is a plus.

Ability to analyze algorithms, modify existing source-code.

Familiarity with SEC IT regulations.

Familiarity with Blockchain, Cryptocurrency and Fintech industry.


Compensation & Benefits:

Competitive salary

Annual paid holidays

Health insurance

Provident Fund

Fast-track your career in the blockchain & crypto industry

Flexible work environment

Business Analyst

Responsibilities

Collaborate with clients and stakeholders to understand business processes, identify needs, and translate them into detailed software requirements.

Analyze and document current business processes, workflows, and systems, identifying areas for improvement and optimization.

Work with development teams to design software solutions that meet client requirements, ensuring compatibility with existing systems and integration needs.

Serve as the main point of contact between the client, project managers, and technical teams, ensuring alignment on project goals, scope, and timelines.

Prepare comprehensive documentation, including business requirements, functional specifications, and use cases to guide development and testing.

Collaborate with QA teams to validate software solutions against business requirements, and participate in user acceptance testing (UAT).

Assist in managing changes in scope, identifying potential risks, and communicating impacts to project timelines and deliverables.

Facilitate training sessions and provide ongoing support to end-users during the system implementation and post-deployment phases.




Qualifications

Minimum 1-7 years of experience as Business Analyst in Financial Service Industry specifically with mutual funds or investment projects, is highly beneficial.

Experience working on similar projects involving financial products or investment management is a plus.

Excellent analytical and problem-solving skills with technical understanding.

Solid communication skills to liaise with the business stakeholder and the technical team.

Clear understanding of software development cycle.

A Highly organized and detail oriented, vocal and fast learner.

Able to work independently as well as collaboratively in a team.




System Analyst

Responsibilities:

Requirements Gathering:

Collaborate with clients, stakeholders, and end-users to gather detailed business requirements.

Conduct interviews, workshops, and surveys to understand client needs and objectives.

Systems Analysis and Design:

Analyze business processes and identify areas for improvement through technology.

Develop detailed specifications and functional designs for new systems or system enhancements.

Create data models, process flows, and technical documentation.

Solution Development:

Work with software developers and IT teams to translate requirements into technical solutions.

Oversee the development process to ensure alignment with the specified requirements.

Conduct feasibility studies and propose cost-effective solutions.

Implementation and Testing:

Coordinate and participate in system testing, including unit testing, integration testing, and user acceptance testing (UAT).

Identify, document, and resolve system issues and defects.

Assist in the deployment of new systems and ensure successful implementation.

Client Support and Training:

Provide ongoing support and troubleshooting for implemented systems.

Develop training materials and conduct training sessions for end-users.

Act as a liaison between clients and the IT team to ensure effective communication and satisfaction.

Documentation and Reporting:

Maintain comprehensive documentation of systems, processes, and changes.

Prepare reports on system performance, project status, and other key metrics.

Continuous Improvement:

Stay updated with the latest industry trends, technologies, and best practices.

Recommend improvements to existing systems and processes to enhance efficiency and effectiveness.




Qualifications:

Education: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Business Administration, or a related field.

Experience: Minimum 1-7 years of experience as a Systems Analyst or in a similar role within an IT Professional Services environment.




Technical Skills:  


Proficiency in systems analysis and design methodologies.

Experience with databases, software development, and system integration.

Knowledge of programming languages and software development tools (e.g., SQL, Java, C#, etc.).

Familiarity with project management tools and techniques.

Soft Skills:

Strong analytical and problem-solving abilities.

Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.

Ability to work collaboratively in a team environment and with clients.

Detail-oriented with a focus on delivering high-quality results.

Make an impact with NTT DATA
Join a company that is pushing the boundaries of what is possible. We are renowned for our technical excellence and leading innovations, and for making a difference to our clients and society. Our workplace embraces diversity and inclusion – it’s a place where you can grow, belong and thrive.

Your day at NTT DATA
As a Cloud Technical Architect at NTT DATA, you will be a key player in designing and occasionally implementing cloud-based solutions that align with our clients' business and technical requirements. You'll partner with stakeholders to understand their needs and translate them into scalable, secure, and cost-effective cloud solutions. You'll be seen as a trusted technical advisor, ensuring that our solutions meet clients' objectives and support their growth.

On a day-to-day basis, you will design and architect cloud-based systems that guarantee high availability, scalability, performance, and reliability. From working with sales teams to providing pre-sales technical support, you'll ensure seamless integration of cloud environments with on-premises solutions. Your input will drive the optimization and security of our cloud infrastructure, crafting migration strategies and ensuring compliance with industry standards.

Collaboration is key to your role. You'll work with cross-functional teams, including developers, operations, and project managers, to align technical solutions with business goals. You will take charge of developing and maintaining our cloud governance frameworks, policies, and procedures, ensuring that best practices are followed. Your role will also involve handling client proof-of-concept (POC) initiatives, guiding these projects from conception to delivery with the necessary resources.

You'll be the go-to expert on cloud technologies and architectures, from assessing existing systems to defining and enforcing security best practices. You will be instrumental in supporting sales teams by offering insights during the scope of work determinations, product pricing, and rFP/rFI responses. Additionally, you will play a crucial role in preparing technical design documents and supporting project implementations to ensure a smooth transition to the delivery team.



To thrive in this role, you need to have:
A comprehensive understanding of cloud architecture patterns, including microservices, serverless computing, containers, and hybrid cloud deployments.
Proficiency with cloud infrastructure technologies such as virtual machines, storage solutions, networking, and load balancing.
In-depth knowledge of cloud security principles, including identity and access management, encryption, and compliance frameworks like GdPr, HIPAA, or PCI-dSS.
Familiarity with Infrastructure as Code (IaC) tools and frameworks such as Terraform, AWS CloudFormation, Azure resource Manager, or Google Cloud deployment Manager.
Extensive experience with major cloud platforms like AWS, Microsoft Azure, or Google Cloud Platform.
Proven experience in designing and implementing cloud architectures for complex systems and applications.
Strong client engagement skills and technical consulting aptitude.
A bachelor’s degree in information technology, Computer Science, Information Systems, or a related field.

Workplace type:

Hybrid Working

About the role

Tech Combine Co., Ltd. is seeking an experienced QA Engineer to join our team in Bangkok on a contract basis. In this role, you will be responsible for ensuring the quality and reliability of our software products through rigorous testing and quality assurance processes. As a critical member of the development team, you will play a key part in delivering high-quality, innovative solutions to our customers.

What you'll be doing

Developing and executing comprehensive test plans and test cases to validate the functionality, performance, and usability of our software applications

Identifying, documenting, and tracking defects throughout the software development lifecycle

Collaborating with development teams to reproduce, analyse, and resolve reported issues

Automating test cases to improve efficiency and coverage

Providing regular status updates and reporting on test activities and findings

Continuously improving testing processes and methodologies to enhance product quality

What we're looking for

Strong experience (3+ years) in software quality assurance and testing, preferably in an Agile/DevOps environment

Proficiency in manual and automated testing techniques, including writing test scripts and using test automation tools

Excellent problem-solving and analytical skills, with the ability to think critically and identify creative solutions

Good command of English, both written and verbal, to effectively communicate with cross-functional teams

Familiarity with software development life cycle methodologies and testing frameworks

Knowledge of web technologies, databases, and cloud infrastructure a plus


What we offer

At Tech Combine Co., Ltd., we believe in fostering a dynamic and collaborative work environment that empowers our employees to thrive. We offer competitive compensation, opportunities for professional development, and a range of benefits to support your overall well-being. Join us and be a part of our mission to deliver world-class software solutions.

If you're ready to take on this exciting challenge, apply now and let's discuss how your skills and experience can contribute to our success.

Job Description

     We are seeking an experienced Software Developer to join our team. We are currently utilizing technology based on JavaScript/TypeScript, HTML5/CSS3, Java, Golang and C# to build applications that support business growth. Job Description

Design and develop Web/Mobile applications from Figma / Adobe XD designs.

Design and implement Web APIs / Web Services based on requirements.

Collaborate with UX/UI designers to ensure pixel-perfect, accessible UIs.

Review, refactor and optimize source code for performance and maintainability.

Enforce quality standards and conduct code reviews before handing off to QA.

Design and maintain database schemas for web applications.

Troubleshoot issues, provide clear diagnoses and long-term fixes.

Collect and analyze data (logs, metrics) to prevent future setbacks.

Deliver tasks on time and communicate progress proactively.

Continuously learn new technologies and share knowledge with the team.


Requirements

Bachelor’s Degree in Computer Science, Computer Engineering, or related field.

*Fresh graduates with strong academic performance and relevant internship experience are also encouraged to apply.

Strong problem-solving and analytical skills.

Experience with RESTful APIs, WebSockets or a microservices architecture.

Solid understanding of JavaScript/TypeScript across front- and back-end.

Familiarity with relational (PostgreSQL, MySQL) and NoSQL (MongoDB, Redis) databases.

Excellent communication skills for collaborating with cross-functional teams.

“Can-do” attitude, team player, and eagerness to learn.

Proficient with Git and modern version control workflows (GitHub/GitLab/Bitbucket).


Frontend (FE):

Frameworks/Libraries: Flutter, React, Angular, Next.js, React Native (or Vue.js, Svelte).

UI/Styles: HTML5, CSS3 (SASS/LESS), Tailwind CSS, Material-UI.

State Management & Data Fetching: Redux, NgRx, React Query, Apollo Client.

Tooling & Testing: Webpack/Vite, Jest, React Testing Library, Cypress.


Backend (BE):

Languages/Frameworks: Golang, Java (Spring Boot), NestJS (TypeScript), C# (.NET Core) (or Node.js/Express, Python/Django).

API & Services: RESTful APIs, GraphQL, gRPC, WebSockets.

Architecture: Microservices, Serverless (AWS Lambda/GCP Cloud Functions).

DevOps & Infra: Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD (Jenkins, GitHub Actions), message queues (Kafka, RabbitMQ).
